author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: DeepSource Bug Risk category to zero (baseline: ~1.2k issues)

Post-alignment bug-risk findings triaged newest-first by rule: real defects fixed (with covering spec per repo policy) and cross-filed as pm defects when user-visible; false positives suppressed per-rule with rationale; category reads 0; count trajectory noted on pm-vlnc

message: Bug Risk is the category most likely to contain real signal among the legacy stock. Post-alignment count will be much lower than 1.2k. Any genuine defect found here follows normal filing conventions (issue items, GH linkage when user-facing).
